svg.title: safemon system architecture
svg.desc: safemon component diagram: CAN bus feeds safemon-app which writes to Redis. safemon-display reads Redis and renders to DSI LCD. gRPC server inside safemon-app streams to remote clients. ECDSA verifies config on startup.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does vcan0 work in safemon?')
sendPrompt('What Redis keys does safemon use?')
sendPrompt('What does the gRPC client receive from safemon?')
